zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin於1238年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格可萊斯 盧皮時，她的父親Gunther I Count of Lindau27歲，母親Eufemie von Rügen23歲。她和John I Lord of Werle至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1301年1月26日享年63歲，埋葬在德國福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林。

nameMeanings.name: Sophia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin was born in 1238, in Ruppin, Brandenburg, Prussia, Germany, her father, Gunther I Count of Lindau, was 27 and her mother, Eufemie von Rügen, was 23. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with John I Lord of Werle. She died on 26 January 1301, at the age of 63, and was buried in Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin est née en 1238, à Kreis Ruppin, Provinz Brandenburg, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Gunther I Count of Lindau, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eufemie von Rügen, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec John I Lord of Werle. Elle est décédée le 26 janvier 1301, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Allemagne.

de.Ruppin, Brandenburg, Prussia, Germany: Kreis Ruppin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin 1238 in Kreis Ruppin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gunther I Count of Lindau 27 und ihre Mutter Eufemie von Rügen 23. Sie hatte mit John I Lord of Werle mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Januar 1301 im Alter von 63 Jahren und wurde in Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Deutschland begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con John I Lord of Werle. Morì il 26 gennaio 1301, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germania.

ko.Ruppin, Brandenburg, Prussia, Germany: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 브랜덴버그 크레이스 루핀
ko.lifeSummary: Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin(이)가 1238년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 브랜덴버그 크레이스 루핀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gunther I Count of Lindau(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eufemie von Rügen(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 John I Lord of Werle(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1301년 1월 26일 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레이스타앳 클렌버그-슈워인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin nasceu em 1238, em Kreis Ruppin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Gunther I Count of Lindau, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Eufemie von Rügen, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com John I Lord of Werle. Ela faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1301, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemanha.

ru.Ruppin, Brandenburg, Prussia, Germany: крис руппин, провинз брэнденбург, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin родилась в 1238 г. в местности крис руппин, провинз брэнденбург, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Gunther I Count of Lindau было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eufemie von Rügen, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от John I Lord of Werle. Она умерла 26 января 1301 г. в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности фристаат меккленбург-щвирин, Германия.
